response.justification: Wei Chen demonstrates strong distributed systems and infrastructure experience from roles at Dunnhumby and cloud work with AWS CDK at Optilyz, but critically fails to meet two essential requirements: only ~6 months of documented C++ experience (versus 8-year minimum) with most work 10+ years in the past, and no formal technical leadership or team mentoring history beyond a 2-month-old Staff role at re:cinq. The background is a generalist full-stack engineer rather than a cloud compute platform infrastructure specialist.
strengths: Strong distributed systems experience at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency requirements
Hands-on infrastructure and DevOps background setting up CI/CD pipelines, GitLab, Docker, and deployment automation at Altom
Multi-domain full-stack engineering across 15+ years showing adaptability and breadth in problem-solving
concerns: Critical C++ gap: only 6 months documented C++ work at National Instruments (2014-2015) versus 8-year minimum requirement, plus nearly a decade without C++
No formal technical leadership experience: only 2 months in Staff role with no evidence of mentoring teams or leading engineers before that
Missing cloud compute platform specialization: experience is broad generalist work rather than focused infrastructure or compute platform architecture
